author: ben_a_adams
content: I prefer the 3rd one though does it deal with OOG differently? (is there a corner case)

author: draganrakita
content: It does handle oog differently.  Idea being that you spend 100gas, pop items from stack and do checks, if any of it fail, continue execution, you dont need to create new frame or load targets.

author: draganrakita
content: To note. I like my proposal (3th one), 1th is okay and 2th is just strange imo.

author: jwasinger
content: I looked into this.  For Geth, we will have to reorder checks in the gas handler in a way that will make the diff nontrivial

author: jwasinger
content: It's doable.  But doesn't really feel worth it to cover an edge-case that won't happen often enough to make a big difference

author: draganrakita
content: <@427903869226582018> you are saying this for the 3th option?

author: jwasinger
content: yeah, I'm saying that personally I think we should keep it as is

author: draganrakita
content: Sorry for being pain here, as is as 1th option 🙂

author: marioevz
content:
I have the same opinion, I left a comment on the PR here: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2900/changes#r3437107832
This is the only thing that separates option 2 from 3 IMO.

author: matkt0
content:
As we said during the call for Besu, we think it will make the code more complicated on the Besu side, but if everyone agrees on the proposal 3, we won't oppose it. I've started to get lost in the different proposals, the 3rd one is maybe the least bad but I will prefer 1 personally

similar to <@427903869226582018> the 3rd one  will create a lot of branches in the code

author: edgl_dev
content: for Ethrex we prefer option 1, we also agree that option 3 doesn't feel worth it for the complexity it adds, though if 3 is decided by majority we won't oppose it either

author: b.hartnett
content: For Nimbus we prefer option 3. Better to reduce the number of state look ups when possible.

author: marioevz
content:
Tally (please correct me if I'm wrong):

Neth: 3
Reth: 3
Besu: 1
Ethrex: 1
Nimbus: 3
Erigon: N/A

author: marioevz
content: Side note: I think Option 3 requires an updated EIP-7928 to mention that we are modifying the gas charges

author: spencer_tb
content: I feel like we should lean on 1 unless anyone is strongly for 3?
